product fit issues.evidence_span: The new version of something only to find out the old version was better. It's getting really annoying that apple only tells you about the "new" features and doesn't tell you what you lose when you upgrade. First they changed the shape so it doesn't fit your ear as well as the prior version. I have to try to jam these in my ear and they constantly fall out.
product fit issues.reason: The new product has a poor physical fit, causing discomfort and frequent falling out.

Siri Functionality.evidence_span: you have to use at least 2 fingers to gently message the stem in just the right way, rather than just a simple tap (while you are also holding your keys or wallet for example). Last but not least if you are planning to customize the way you use them (the gestures), like you used to be able to do on the OLDER cheaper version you can forget it. That's gone. Can't customize the new ones.
Siri Functionality.reason: The new AirPods have a less intuitive and cumbersome control system for Siri, requiring a more cumbersome force control.

Customization Limitations.evidence_span: you have to use at least 2 fingers to gently message the stem in just the right way, rather than just a simple tap (while you are also holding your keys or wallet for example). Last but not least if you are planning to customize the way you use them (the gestures), like you used to be able to do on the OLDER cheaper version you can forget it. That's gone. Can't customize the new ones.
Customization Limitations.reason: The new AirPods do not allow customization of gestures, requiring users to learn predefined controls.
